title: Review
description: A critic or audience review returned by the Rotten Tomatoes API.

critic.description: The name of the critic who wrote the review.

date.description: The date the review was published (YYYY-MM-DD).

freshness.description: Whether the review is fresh (positive) or rotten (negative).

publication.description: The name of the publication where the review appeared.

quote.description: A brief excerpt or quote from the review.
